case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. NATIONS ROOFING COMPANY AND ITS SUCCESSORS

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONS ROOFING COMPANY AND ITS SUCCESSORS $2,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $461.71 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,936.71, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
